creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Fixed in libtool-1.5.22_4 and libltdl-1.5.22_2 - a necessary patch 
to prevent insanely long startup times for libltdl-using ports 
resulted in the build infrastructure failing in a somewhat 
non-deterministic fashion, depending on the ports already installed 
on a system.
